requirement_topic.en: Market Access — No Single Canadian Conformity Mark
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——加拿大无单一合格标志
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——加拿大無單一合格標誌

summary.en: Canada does not operate one federal conformity mark equivalent to CE for power banks. Market access is a combined file: TDG/UN 38.3 transport compliance, CCPSA consumer product safety controls, bilingual labelling, honest advertising, and any retailer or provincial electrical safety certification demanded for the sales channel.
summary.zh: 加拿大对于移动电源没有等同CE的单一联邦合格标志。市场准入由多项文件共同构成：TDG/UN 38.3运输合规、CCPSA消费品安全控制、双语标签、真实广告宣传，以及销售渠道要求的零售商或省级电气安全认证。
summary.zht: 加拿大對於行動電源沒有等同CE的單一聯邦合格標誌。市場准入由多項文件共同構成：TDG/UN 38.3運輸合規、CCPSA消費品安全控制、雙語標籤、真實廣告宣傳，以及銷售渠道要求的零售商或省級電氣安全認證。

standards_or_laws: Transportation of Dangerous Goods Regulations, SOR/2001-286
Canada Consumer Product Safety Act, S.C. 2010, c. 21
Consumer Packaging and Labelling Act, R.S.C., 1985, c. C-38
Canadian retailer and authority-having-jurisdiction certification requirements

summary.en: China exporters may be accustomed to presenting a compact set of GB, CCC, UN 38.3, MSDS/SDS, and factory documents. This package is useful evidence but does not create a Canadian mark or approval, and should not be advertised as Canadian compliance unless reviewed against Canadian law and buyer requirements.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常会提交GB、CCC、UN 38.3、MSDS/SDS及工厂文件等较集中资料。该资料包可作为有用证据，但不会形成加拿大标志或批准，未经加拿大法律及买方要求审核，不应宣传为加拿大合规。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常會提交GB、CCC、UN 38.3、MSDS/SDS及工廠文件等較集中資料。該資料包可作為有用證據，但不會形成加拿大標誌或批准，未經加拿大法律及買方要求審核，不應宣傳為加拿大合規。

gap.en: The strategic gap is assuming one certificate unlocks Canada. A Canada-ready power bank file should map each obligation to the responsible party: Chinese manufacturer, exporter, carrier, importer of record, distributor, retailer, and marketplace. The file should avoid implying that Canada has issued a single product approval when it has not.
gap.zh: 战略性差距在于误以为一张证书即可打开加拿大市场。加拿大版移动电源文件应将每项义务映射至责任方：中国制造商、出口商、承运人、登记进口商、分销商、零售商及平台。文件还应避免暗示加拿大已签发单一产品批准。
gap.zht: 戰略性差距在於誤以為一張證書即可打開加拿大市場。加拿大版行動電源文件應將每項義務映射至責任方：中國製造商、出口商、承運人、登記進口商、分銷商、零售商及平台。文件還應避免暗示加拿大已簽發單一產品批准。

mandatory_status.target: No single mark; applicable transport, safety, labelling, advertising, retailer, and provincial requirements must be satisfied as relevant
mandatory_status.cn: China-side certificates remain jurisdiction-specific and do not create Canadian market approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build a Canada-specific compliance matrix rather than searching for a single Canadian mark. Validate transport, safety, labelling, certification, and buyer requirements separately.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】应建立加拿大专用合规矩阵，而不是寻找单一加拿大标志。运输、安全、标签、认证及买方要求需分别确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】應建立加拿大專用合規矩陣，而不是尋找單一加拿大標誌。運輸、安全、標籤、認證及買方要求需分別確認。
